creator: lane@joeandlane.com
text:
Sergey,

I'm sorry to report that portsdb -Fu does not resolve the issue.

portsdb -Fu appears to work properly, as the database is downloaded, but 
pkgdb -F still fails with "can't convert nil string"

server# pkgdb -F
--->  Checking the package registry database
Missing origin: bsdpan-CPAN-1.87
-> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
Missing origin: bsdpan-Term-ReadLine-Perl-1.0302
-> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
Missing origin: bsdpan-TermReadKey-2.30
-> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
Duplicated origin: x11-toolkits/pango - pango-1.12.3 pango-1.12.4
Unregister any of them? [no]
Duplicated origin: devel/p5-PathTools - bsdpan-PathTools-3.19 
p5-PathTools-3.19
Unregister any of them? [no]
Stale dependency: firefox-1.5.0.7,1 -> fam-2.6.10_1 ():
Install stale dependency? ([y]es/[n]o/[a]ll) [yes]
can't convert nil into String


the offending package, fam-2.6.10_1, is NOT installed, and won't compile 
because of a configuration error.   I have notified the maintainer, but have 
not yet heard back.

Meanwhile, I've attempted to detect all ports which require devel/fam thusly:

locate Makefile | grep /usr/ports | grep -v ncvs | xargs grep devel/fam

This yields the following ports:

devel/fampp 
dns/posadis 
graphics/passepartout 
mail/courier-imap 
sysutils/apachetop 
x11-fm/gnome-commander

None of these ports are installed, either.

But when I look in the package tree:

find /var/db/pkg/ | xargs grep fam-2

/var/db/pkg/gnome-vfs-2.14.2_3/+CONTENTS:@comment DELETED:pkgdep fam-2.6.10_1

I'm hesitant to edit the +CONTENTS files to "fix" this, as I'm sure I'll break 
something else.  

Do you have any recommendations?

Thanks for your help, so far.

Lane
